Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.subtitle: Last updated: April 2026
Privacy.introContent: Welcome to Utilyx. We take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our site utilyx.app.
Privacy.localContent: All Utilyx tools run entirely in your browser. Your files (PDFs, images, videos, texts) are never sent to our servers. They stay on your device and are processed locally. We have no access to your data.
Privacy.adsenseContent: We use Google AdSense to display advertisements. AdSense may use cookies to serve ads based on your previous visits. You can disable personalized advertising via Google Ads settings (https://www.google.com/settings/ads). Under GDPR, you have the right to object to the processing of your personal data for targeted advertising purposes.
Privacy.analyticsContent: We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors use our site. Collected data is anonymized (IP masked). We track: pages visited, visit duration, browser and device. You can install the Google Analytics opt-out plugin (https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout).
Privacy.cookiesContent: Our site uses technical cookies necessary for operation (theme preference, ad consent). Advertising cookies are placed by Google AdSense and are subject to Google's privacy policy. You can manage your cookie preferences in your browser settings.
Privacy.thirdContent:
We use the following services:
- Google AdSense: advertising (https://policies.google.com/privacy)
- Google Analytics: audience analysis (https://policies.google.com/privacy)
- Vercel: hosting and CDN (https://vercel.com/legal/privacy-policy)
These services may collect data in accordance with their own privacy policies.
Privacy.childrenContent: Utilyx is not specifically directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors. Under COPPA, if you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.
Privacy.changesContent: We reserve the right to modify this policy at any time. Changes will be published on this page with the update date. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of those changes.
Privacy.contactContent: For any questions regarding this privacy policy, contact us at: privacy@utilyx.app

About.title: About Utilyx
About.subtitle: 47+ free tools, 100% private, no sign-up required.
About.missionContent: Utilyx was created with a simple belief: online tools should be free, fast and respectful of your privacy. No sign-up, no data collection, no artificial limits.
About.feature1Desc: Your files never leave your device. All processing happens locally in your browser.
About.feature2Desc: No server upload. Tools work directly in your browser, even with a slow connection.
About.feature3Desc: Available in French, English, Spanish, German, Arabic and Portuguese.
About.feature4Desc: No account required. Use the tools instantly, with no barriers.
About.privacyContent: Unlike other platforms that upload your files to their servers, Utilyx processes everything locally. Your documents, images and videos stay on your device. That's our fundamental promise.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.subtitle: Last updated: April 2026
Terms.acceptanceContent: By accessing and using the site utilyx.app, you accept these terms of service. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use the site.
Terms.descriptionContent: Utilyx is a suite of free online tools for manipulating PDF files, images, videos, texts and using various generators and calculators. All processing is performed locally in your browser.
Terms.useContent:
You agree to:
- Use the site in accordance with applicable laws
- Not use the tools for illegal or fraudulent purposes
- Not attempt to disrupt the operation of the site
- Not use robots or automated scripts without authorization
Terms.intellectualContent: The content of the site (design, logos, texts, code) is the property of Utilyx. You may not reproduce, distribute or modify the content without prior authorization.
Terms.liabilityContent: Utilyx is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability of the service or the absence of errors. We are not responsible for direct or indirect damages resulting from the use of the site.
Terms.dataContent: The processing of personal data is described in our Privacy Policy. Under GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify and delete your data.
Terms.adsContent: The site displays advertisements via Google AdSense. Advertisers may use cookies to personalize ads. You can manage your advertising preferences via Google settings. We are not responsible for the content of displayed advertisements.
Terms.modificationsContent: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on the site.
Terms.lawContent: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the French courts.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: A question, suggestion or issue? Don’t hesitate to reach out.
Contact.subjectPlaceholder: What would you like to discuss?
Contact.successMessage: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
Contact.errorMessage: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us directly by email.
Contact.altContact: You can also write to us directly at contact@utilyx.app
Contact.faq1A: You can contact us via the form above or by email at contact@utilyx.app. We typically respond within 24 to 48 hours.
Contact.faq2A: Yes. All our tools run 100% locally in your browser. Your files are never sent to our servers. The only data we collect is from the contact form, retained for a maximum of 12 months.
Contact.faq3A: Yes, all Utilyx tools are 100% free, with no signup required and no usage limits. The site is funded by advertising (Google AdSense).
Contact.faq4Q: How do I report a bug or suggest an improvement?
Contact.faq4A: Use the contact form above and select "Suggestion" or "Bug" as the subject. You can also email us directly at contact@utilyx.app.
Contact.faq5Q: How long does it take to get a response?
Contact.faq5A: We aim to respond within 24 to 48 business hours. For urgent matters, please mention it in your message.

ApiKeys.title: Free API Keys
ApiKeys.subtitle: Generate a free API key to access Utilyx tools programmatically.
ApiKeys.successDesc: Copy your key now. It won't be shown in plain text again.
ApiKeys.keyWarning: Warning: this key will only be displayed once. Copy it now.
ApiKeys.noKeys: No keys found for this email.
ApiKeys.modalExpiredDesc: Your free key is no longer valid. Regenerate a new key or upgrade to unlimited.

ApiDocs.subtitle: Automate your tasks with our free API. No credit card required, sign up in 30 seconds.
ApiDocs.step1Desc: Create a free API key on Utilyx. No signup required, just an optional email.
ApiDocs.step2Desc: Send your key via the Authorization: Bearer <key> or X-API-Key header.
ApiDocs.step3Desc: Receive structured JSON responses, ready to integrate into your application.
ApiDocs.feature1Desc: No credit card, no subscription. Renew your key every 5 days.
ApiDocs.feature2Desc: Generous limit for free usage. Enough for most projects.
ApiDocs.feature3Desc: Structured and consistent responses, easy to parse in any language.
ApiDocs.feature4Desc: Call the API directly from your browser or frontend.
ApiDocs.faq1Q: Is the Utilyx API really free?
ApiDocs.faq1A: Yes, completely free. No credit card required. Your key expires after 5 days — just come back to the site to regenerate one.
ApiDocs.faq2Q: Why does the key expire after 5 days?
ApiDocs.faq2A: To prevent abuse and encourage you to return to Utilyx. Regeneration is instant and free.
ApiDocs.faq3A: 100 requests per hour per API key. Sufficient for most personal projects and prototypes.
ApiDocs.faq4Q: Which tools are accessible via the API?
ApiDocs.faq4A: Currently: word counter, QR code and UUID. More endpoints (OCR, image compression, etc.) coming soon.
ApiDocs.faq5A: Add your key in the Authorization: Bearer <your-key> or X-API-Key: <your-key> header.
ApiDocs.tryItDesc: Get your free API key and start automating your tasks in under a minute.
ApiDocs.toolWordCounterDesc: Count words, characters, sentences and reading time via API.
ApiDocs.toolQrCodeDesc: Generate QR codes in PNG or SVG format via API.
ApiDocs.toolUuidDesc: Generate unique UUID v4s via API.

Legal.title: Legal Notice
Legal.subtitle: Legal information for the Utilyx website.
Legal.editorContent:
Utilyx
Website: https://utilyx.app
Status: Free online service
Legal.hostContent:
Vercel Inc.
440 N Barranca Ave #4133
Covina, CA 91723
United States
Website: https://vercel.com
Legal.directorContent: The publication director of the Utilyx website is the legal representative of the publisher.
Legal.contactContent: For any questions regarding the site, you can contact us at: contact@utilyx.app
Legal.cnilContent: In accordance with the French Data Protection Act of January 6, 1978, as amended, and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify, delete and port your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at: privacy@utilyx.app. The Utilyx website does not collect personal data directly through its tools, as they operate entirely locally in your browser.
Legal.rgpdContent: Utilyx complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR – Regulation EU 2016/679). The data controller is Utilyx (contact@utilyx.app). The only personal data collected is from the contact form (name, email, subject, message) and analytics/advertising cookies. Contact form data is retained for a maximum of 12 months and then deleted. No file data processed by our tools is collected or stored.
Legal.personalDataContent:
In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights:
- Right of access: obtain a copy of your data
- Right to rectification: correct inaccurate data
- Right to erasure: request the deletion of your data
- Right to data portability: receive your data in a structured format
- Right to object: object to the processing of your data
- Right to restriction: limit the processing of your data
To exercise these rights, contact privacy@utilyx.app. You may also file a complaint with the relevant supervisory authority.
Legal.cookiesContent:
The utilyx.app website uses cookies in the following categories:
1. Strictly necessary cookies: theme preference (dark/light), cookie consent. Lifetime: 1 year.
2. Analytics cookies: Google Analytics (_ga, _gid). Lifetime: up to 2 years. IP anonymized.
3. Advertising cookies: Google AdSense and DoubleClick (IDE, DSID, etc.). Lifetime: variable (13 months max). Used for ad personalization.
You can manage your cookie preferences via our consent banner or your browser settings.
Legal.intellectualContent: All content on the utilyx.app website (texts, images, logos, design, source code) is protected by copyright and intellectual property law. Any reproduction, representation, modification or distribution, even partial, by any means whatsoever, is prohibited without the prior written authorization of Utilyx. The name "Utilyx" and the Utilyx logo are protected trademarks.
Legal.liabilityContent: Utilyx provides its tools "as is" without any warranty, express or implied. Utilyx shall not be held liable for any direct or indirect damages resulting from the use of the site or its tools. The tools are provided free of charge and the user remains solely responsible for the use made of the results obtained.
Legal.faq1Q: Does Utilyx collect my personal data?
Legal.faq1A: No. All Utilyx tools operate 100% locally in your browser. Your files (PDF, images, videos) are never sent to our servers. The only data collected is from the contact form and analytics/advertising cookies.
Legal.faq2A: The site is hosted by Vercel Inc., 440 N Barranca Ave #4133, Covina, CA 91723, United States.
Legal.faq3Q: How can I exercise my GDPR rights?
Legal.faq3A: You can exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure and portability by contacting us at privacy@utilyx.app. You may also file a complaint with the relevant supervisory authority.
